case_title: ALAN K. TOMA VS. DAVID G. FINKELSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOMA, ALAN K. AS TO DEFENDANT FINKELSTEIN, DAVID G. LAW OFFICES OF DAVID G. FINKELSTEIN, APC FINKELSTEIN & KAMALI, LLP DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-08-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-24-2013
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-19-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
